web_search.name: web_search
web_search.description: 搜索互联网获取最新信息

code_execution.name: code_execution
code_execution.description: 在沙箱中执行 Python 代码

implementation.code: import subprocess; result = subprocess.run(['python', '-c', args.get('code', '')], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30).stdout

read_url.name: read_url
read_url.description: 获取网页内容并转为文本

memory_add.name: memory_add
memory_add.description: 添加一条新事实到用户记忆

implementation.code: from app.services.memory import memory_write; import hashlib; key = f'fact_{hashlib.md5(args["fact"].encode()).hexdigest()[:8]}'; memory_write('user', key, args['fact']); result = {'key': key, 'value': args['fact']}

memory_search.name: memory_search
memory_search.description: 搜索用户记忆中的事实

implementation.code: from app.services.memory import memory_search; results = memory_search('user', args['query']); result = {'results': results}

memory_replace.name: memory_replace
memory_replace.description: 替换用户记忆中的一条事实

implementation.code: from app.services.memory import memory_replace; ok = memory_replace('user', args['old_fact'], args['new_fact']); result = {'replaced': ok}

memory_remove.name: memory_remove
memory_remove.description: 删除用户记忆中的一条事实

implementation.code: from app.services.memory import memory_delete, memory_list; items = memory_list('user'); found = [it for it in items if it['value'] == args['fact']]; key = found[0]['key'] if found else None; ok = bool(key);
implementation.after: if key: memory_delete('user', key); result = {'removed': ok}

file_operations.name: file_operations
file_operations.description: 读写、搜索、列出文件（沙箱路径内）

skill_write_file.name: skill_write_file
skill_write_file.description: 写入技能附属文件（如模板、配置）

implementation.code: from app.services.skill import skill_write_file; r = skill_write_file(args['skill_name'], args['filename'], args['content']); result = r
from app.services.skill import skill_remove_file; r = skill_remove_file(args['skill_name'], args['filename']); result = r
